song.title: Unto Thee O Lord
song.lyrics:
[v1] Unto Thee, oh Lord Do I lift up my soul Unto Thee oh Lord Do I lift up my soul
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me.
[v2] Yea, let none that wait on Thee be ashamed Yea, let none that wait on Thee be ashamed
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me.
[v3] Show me Thy way, O Lord teach me Thy paths Show me Thy way, O Lord teach me Thy paths
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me. [v4] Lead me in Thy truth, O Lord, and teach me Lead me in Thy truth, O Lord, and teach me
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me. [v5] Remember, O Lord, Thy tender mercies Remember, O Lord, Thy tender mercies
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me. [v6] Remember not the sins of my youth Remember not the sins of my youth
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me. [v7] All the paths of the Lord are mercy and truth All the paths of the Lord are mercy and truth
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me. [v8] The secret of the Lord is with them that fear Him The secret of the Lord is with them that fear Him
Oh my God, I trust in Thee Let me not be ashamed Let not my enemies triumph over me.
